description: As the DHIS2 System Administrator, you need to configure automated maintenance jobs to ensure data on dashboards is up-to-date. Log in to DHIS2 (admin / district) and configure two enabled scheduled jobs: 'Nightly Analytics Tables' (job type: 'Analytics table') to run daily at 2:00 AM, and 'Weekly Resource Tables' (job type: 'Resource table') to run every Sunday at 3:00 AM.
